settings.title: What drives us to do the work that we do?
settings.body: To provide a learning experience space to empower children through creative art, playing in the big stage, and rhythm dance that expresses emotion.

settings.title: Who benefits?
settings.body: To provide a learning experience space to empower children through creative art, playing in the big stage, and rhythm dance that expresses emotion.

settings.title: What changes because they exist?
settings.body: The outcome is reflected based on our programs and seasonal camps, allowing children to establish teamwork, being driven through creativity, and engaging experiences for families to share across the communities in Queens.
